judge.reason: The function's primary purpose is to remove (unregister and free) all triggers associated with the ADC device. While it does call iio_trigger_free (a put function), this is part of a broader cleanup sequence that includes iio_trigger_unregister. The unregister operation involves removing the trigger from internal lists and possibly other state changes, which goes beyond simple refcount management. The function does not return or expose a reference-counted object to the caller.
